# ── REMOVED (105→57 sources) ────────────────────────────────────────────
# k2jp/abpjf_paranoid.txt — PARANOID mode Japanese filters, too aggressive!
# k2jp/abpjf_3rd_party_sns.txt — blocks all 3rd-party social, breaks embeds
# k2jp/abpjf_element_hiding.txt — aggressive element hiding
# deathbybandaid/ABP-Japanese-Paranoid-Filters — same paranoid list, parsed
# deathbybandaid/ABP-Japanese-3rd-Party-SNS-Filters — same SNS list, parsed
# deathbybandaid/ABP-Japanese-Filters — parsed duplicate of k2jp/abpjf
# deathbybandaid/JapaneseSiteAdblockFilterver2 — parsed duplicate
# deathbybandaid/EasyList-Dutch — parsed duplicate of EasyDutch
# deathbybandaid/Adblock-Persian — parsed duplicate of PersianBlocker
# deathbybandaid/CountryCodesLists/* (4 URLs) — country-code DNS lists, too broad
# ideone.com/plain/K452p — random Ideone paste! Not maintained, could be anything
# DandelionSprout/JapaneseTextSoftener — not adblocking, text display tweaks
# sioxe823/chinese_gov_forced_install — niche Chinese gov list
# tcptomato/road-kill-filters — "road kill" — aggressive variant
# qme.mydns.jp/AdblockV2.txt — duplicate of Adblock.txt above
# huzunluartemis/BadIpList — IP-level blocking, too broad for browser
# huzunluartemis/ElementalList — aggressive element hiding
# MajkiIT/adblock_ublock.txt — ublock-specific variant, have adguard version
# All filters.adtidy.org/extension/* duplicates (30+ URLs) — chromium/ublock/optimized
#   variants are duplicates of FiltersRegistry canonical versions above
# easylist-downloads.adblockplus.org/*+easylist combined variants (7 URLs) —
#   include full EasyList again, standalone versions preferred
# easylist-msie.adblockplus.org/easylistspanish+easylist — IE-specific mirror
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
